name: Button
description: Button component to render button or link
searchText: button button component to render button or link @mantine/core /core/button autocontrast children color disabled fullwidth gradient justify leftsection loaderprops loading radius rightsection size borderwidth children orientation autocontrast gradient radius size

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: children
props.description: Button content

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute, applies disabled styles

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Sets width: 100%

props.name: gradient
props.description: Gradient configuration used for variant="gradient"

props.name: justify
props.description: Sets justify-content of inner element, can be used to change distribution of sections and label

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content on the left side of the button label

props.name: loaderProps
props.description: Props added to the Loader component (only visible when loading prop is set)

props.name: loading
props.description: If set, the Loader component is displayed over the button

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content on the right side of the button label

props.name: size
props.description: Controls button height, font-size and horizontal padding

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: border-width of the child Button components. Numbers are converted to rem.

props.name: children
props.description: Button components

props.name: orientation
props.description: Orientation of the group

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: gradient
props.description: Gradient configuration used when variant="gradient"

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: size
props.description: Controls section height, font-size and horizontal padding
